project.name: TraceTap Transformation
project.description: 3-month plan to transform TraceTap into a must-have QA tool

issues.description:
Build a bash script (install.sh) that installs TraceTap with zero friction.

**Requirements:**
- Detect OS (Linux/macOS/Windows)
- Install Python if needed (or use existing)
- Install TraceTap via pip
- Configure PATH
- Verify installation with `tracetap --version`
- Handle errors gracefully

**Files to create:**
- `install.sh` (main installer)
- Test on Linux, macOS

**Acceptance criteria:**
- One command: `curl -sSL https://get.tracetap.io | bash`
- Works on fresh systems
- User-friendly error messages

Create a production-ready Docker image with all dependencies for zero-setup usage.

**Requirements:**
- Based on Python 3.11 slim image
- Include all dependencies (mitmproxy, anthropic, fastapi, etc.)
- Multi-stage build for smaller image size
- Entry point configured for easy usage
- Published to Docker Hub

**Files to create:**
- `Dockerfile`
- `.dockerignore`
- `docker-compose.yml` (for easy local dev)

**Usage:**
```bash
docker run -it tracetap/tracetap capture --port 8080
```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Image size < 500MB
- Works without any additional setup
- Published and accessible

Build an npm package that wraps TraceTap for Node.js/JavaScript teams.

**Requirements:**
- Downloads/uses Python binary
- Proxies commands to TraceTap CLI
- Works with `npx tracetap`
- Cross-platform support

**Files to create:**
- `package.json` (npm package config)
- `wrapper.js` (CLI wrapper script)
- `README-npm.md`

**Publishing:**
- Publish to npmjs.com as `tracetap`

**Acceptance criteria:**
- `npx tracetap capture` works without Python knowledge
- Automatically handles dependencies
- Works on Linux, macOS, Windows

Build Homebrew formula for easy macOS installation.

**Requirements:**
- Create formula file
- Test on macOS
- Submit to homebrew-core or create tap

**Files to create:**
- `tracetap.rb` (Homebrew formula)

**Usage:**
```bash
brew install tracetap
```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Works on macOS Intel and Apple Silicon
- Installs all dependencies
- `tracetap --version` works after install

Build an interactive guided tour that gets users from zero to first tests in 2 minutes.

**Requirements:**
- Command: `tracetap quickstart`
- Interactive prompts using `rich` library
- Auto-detects local dev servers (ports 3000, 8000, 8080)
- Guides through: capture → analyze → generate tests → run tests
- Beautiful CLI output with progress indicators

**Files to create:**
- `src/tracetap/cli/quickstart.py`
- Tests: `tests/test_quickstart.py`

**Flow:**
1. "Let me help you capture your first API traffic..."
2. Detect servers or ask for port
3. Capture 30-60 seconds
4. Auto-generate tests
5. Show results: "You just created 23 tests!"

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Complete flow in < 3 minutes
- Works without prior knowledge
- Clear, friendly output

Create beautiful, shareable HTML reports from captured traffic.

**Requirements:**
- Single-file output (embedded CSS/JS)
- Visual timeline of requests
- Coverage summary (endpoints, methods, status codes)
- Generated test preview
- Responsive design

**Files to create:**
- `src/tracetap/reporting/html_reporter.py`
- `src/tracetap/reporting/templates/report.html.jinja2`
- Tests: `tests/test_html_reporter.py`

**Usage:**
```bash
tracetap analyze demo.json --report html
# Generates: tracetap-report.html
```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Beautiful, professional design
- Works offline (no CDN dependencies)
- Easy to share (single file)
- Mobile-friendly

Build the core engine that converts captured traffic into Playwright regression tests.

**Requirements:**
- Parse captured JSON
- Extract requests/responses
- Group by logical flows
- Generate Playwright test structure
- Handle variable extraction (IDs, tokens)

**Files to create:**
- `src/tracetap/generators/regression_generator.py`
- Tests: `tests/test_regression_generator.py`

**Features:**
- Smart grouping (by endpoint, by flow)
- Variable extraction and reuse
- Test file generation
- Support for assertions

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Generates valid Playwright tests
- Tests can run successfully
- Handles 100+ requests without issues

issues.summary: Build assertion builder for regression tests
issues.description:
Create smart assertion generation for regression test suites.

**Requirements:**
- Status code assertions
- Response schema validation
- Critical field assertions
- Snapshot comparison
- Configurable assertion strategies

**Files to create:**
- `src/tracetap/generators/assertion_builder.py`
- Tests: `tests/test_assertion_builder.py`

**Assertion types:**
- `--assert status-codes` → expect(response.status).toBe(200)
- `--assert response-schemas` → JSON schema validation
- `--assert critical-fields user.id,order.total` → specific field checks

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Generated assertions catch real regressions
- Configurable assertion levels
- Clear assertion failure messages

Add `generate-regression` command to tracetap-replay.py CLI.

**Requirements:**
- New command: `tracetap generate-regression`
- CLI arguments for assertion options
- Output file configuration
- Progress indicators

**Files to modify:**
- `tracetap-replay.py`

**Usage:**
```bash
tracetap generate-regression session.json \
  --output tests/regression.spec.ts \
  --assert status-codes \
  --assert response-schemas \
  --assert critical-fields user.id,order.total
```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Command works end-to-end
- Help text is clear
- Error handling is user-friendly

Comprehensive test suite for regression generation feature.

**Requirements:**
- Unit tests for core engine
- Unit tests for assertion builder
- Integration tests for CLI
- Test with real captured traffic
- Edge case testing

**Files to create/modify:**
- `tests/test_regression_generator.py`
- `tests/test_assertion_builder.py`
- `tests/fixtures/sample-traffic.json`

**Test coverage:**
- Happy path (generate from valid traffic)
- Edge cases (empty traffic, malformed JSON)
- Assertion generation accuracy
- Variable extraction

**Acceptance criteria:**
- 90%+ code coverage
- All tests pass
- Edge cases handled

Build AI-powered traffic pattern analyzer to find testing gaps.

**Requirements:**
- Analyze captured traffic for patterns
- Detect always-present vs never-seen conditions
- Find error paths (4xx, 5xx, rate limits)
- Identify concurrency patterns
- Detect boundary conditions

**Files to create:**
- `src/tracetap/ai/pattern_analyzer.py`
- Tests: `tests/test_pattern_analyzer.py`

**Analysis types:**
- Empty array detection (always returns data, never empty)
- Error path coverage (missing 404, 429, etc.)
- Concurrency detection (simultaneous requests)
- Boundary conditions (min/max values)

**Uses:**
- Claude AI via `src/tracetap/common/ai_utils.py`

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Analyzes 100+ requests in < 30s
- Finds real patterns in test data
- Works with/without AI key (graceful degradation)

Create engine that generates actionable test suggestions based on traffic analysis.

**Requirements:**
- Use pattern analyzer output
- Generate specific test recommendations
- Prioritize suggestions (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
- Format as readable markdown
- Include code snippets for suggested tests

**Files to create:**
- `src/tracetap/ai/test_suggester.py`
- Tests: `tests/test_test_suggester.py`

**Output format:**
```markdown
# TEST SUGGESTIONS

## 1. EDGE CASE: Empty Arrays (Priority: HIGH)
**Observed:** GET /users always returns 1+ users
**Missing Test:** What happens when no users exist?
**Suggested:**
- Test GET /users with empty database
- Verify response is [] not null
```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Suggestions are actionable and specific
- Priority ranking makes sense
- Output is clearly formatted

Add `suggest-tests` command to CLI for AI test suggestions.

**Requirements:**
- New CLI entry or extend existing
- Command line arguments
- Output to markdown file
- Progress indicators for AI analysis

**Files to create/modify:**
- `tracetap-suggest.py` (new CLI) OR extend `tracetap-ai-postman.py`

**Usage:**
```bash
tracetap suggest-tests production-traffic.json \
  --analyze-patterns \
  --find-edges \
  --output suggestions.md
```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Command works end-to-end
- Clear progress indication during AI analysis
- Output file is well-formatted

issues.summary: Write tests for AI test suggester
issues.description:
Test suite for AI test suggestion feature.

**Requirements:**
- Unit tests for pattern analyzer
- Unit tests for test suggester
- Integration tests
- Mock AI responses for reliable testing

**Files to create/modify:**
- `tests/test_pattern_analyzer.py`
- `tests/test_test_suggester.py`
- `tests/fixtures/production-traffic.json`

**Acceptance criteria:**
- 85%+ code coverage
- Tests don't require real AI key
- Edge cases handled

Build contract creator that generates OpenAPI contracts from captured traffic.

**Requirements:**
- Parse captured traffic
- Generate OpenAPI 3.0 specification
- Infer schemas from responses
- Detect path parameters
- Group endpoints logically

**Files to create:**
- `src/tracetap/contract/contract_creator.py`
- Tests: `tests/test_contract_creator.py`

**Features:**
- Schema inference from JSON responses
- Path parameter detection
- Request/response examples
- Valid OpenAPI 3.0 YAML output

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Generated contracts are valid OpenAPI 3.0
- Schemas accurately represent responses
- Works with 100+ endpoints

issues.summary: Build contract verifier and diff engine
issues.description:
Create contract verification tool that compares API behavior against contracts.

**Requirements:**
- Load OpenAPI contract
- Replay traffic against target environment
- Compare responses against contract schemas
- Detect breaking changes (field renames, type changes, missing endpoints)
- Generate diff report

**Files to create:**
- `src/tracetap/contract/contract_verifier.py`
- `src/tracetap/contract/diff_reporter.py`
- Tests: `tests/test_contract_verifier.py`

**Breaking change detection:**
- Field removed (BREAKING)
- Field renamed (BREAKING)
- Type changed (BREAKING)
- New required field (BREAKING)
- Status code changed (WARNING)

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Accurately detects breaking changes
- Exit code 0 for pass, 1 for fail (CI/CD)
- Clear diff output

Add new CLI entry point for contract testing commands.

**Requirements:**
- New CLI: `tracetap-contract.py`
- Subcommands: create, verify
- Arguments for input/output files
- HTML report generation

**Files to create:**
- `tracetap-contract.py`
- Update: `pyproject.toml` (add entry point)

**Usage:**
```bash
# Create contract
tracetap contract create --from traffic.json --output contract.yaml

# Verify contract
tracetap contract verify --contract contract.yaml --target https://staging-api.com --report report.html
```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Both commands work end-to-end
- Help text is clear
- Exit codes work for CI/CD

issues.summary: Build GitHub Action for contract testing
issues.description:
Create GitHub Action that runs contract verification in CI/CD.

**Requirements:**
- Action runs on PRs
- Installs TraceTap
- Verifies contract against target environment
- Comments on PR with results
- Fails PR if contract broken

**Files to create:**
- `integrations/github-action/action.yml`
- `integrations/github-action/README.md`
- `.github/workflows/examples/contract-test.yml` (example)

**Usage:**
```yaml
- uses: tracetap/contract-action@v1
  with:
    contract: ./api-contract.yaml
    target: ${{ secrets.STAGING_URL }}
```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Action works on real repos
- Clear PR comments
- Properly fails/passes PRs

Comprehensive test suite for contract testing features.

**Requirements:**
- Unit tests for creator and verifier
- Integration tests with mock APIs
- Test breaking change detection
- Test report generation

**Files to create/modify:**
- `tests/test_contract_creator.py`
- `tests/test_contract_verifier.py`
- `tests/test_diff_reporter.py`
- `tests/fixtures/api-contract.yaml`

**Acceptance criteria:**
- 90%+ code coverage
- All breaking change types detected
- Tests are fast and reliable

Produce 3-5 minute demo video showing TraceTap's killer features.

**Requirements:**
- Professional screencast
- Clear narration or captions
- Show problem → solution flow
- Highlight all three killer features
- Upload to YouTube

**Script:**
1. Problem (30s) - Manual testing is slow
2. Solution (90s) - Install → Capture → Generate tests
3. Magic (90s) - Test suggestions, contract testing
4. Call to action (30s) - Try it now

**Deliverables:**
- YouTube video (unlisted initially)
- Embed in README
- GIFs extracted for documentation

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Professional quality
- Under 5 minutes
- Clear value proposition

Create comprehensive documentation with new structure focused on QA use cases.

**Requirements:**
- Create `docs/` directory
- Restructure content for QA audience
- Add use case guides
- Create FAQ

**New structure:**
```
docs/
├── index.md (landing)
├── quickstart.md (5-min tutorial)
├── features/
│   ├── regression-testing.md
│   ├── ai-suggestions.md
│   ├── contract-testing.md
│   ├── mock-servers.md
│   └── playwright-generation.md
├── guides/
│   ├── qa-workflows.md
│   ├── ci-cd-integration.md
│   └── best-practices.md
├── api-reference.md
└── faq.md
```

**Files to create:**
- All docs files above
- Update existing REPLAY.md

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Clear, scannable content
- QA-focused language
- Code examples for every feature

Complete rewrite of README.md with benefit-driven, show-don't-tell approach.

**Requirements:**
- Lead with the problem/solution
- Show demo GIF/video
- Quick start prominence
- QA-focused language
- Remove technical jargon

**New structure:**
```markdown
# TraceTap - From Traffic to Tests in Minutes

[Video Demo] [Quick Start] [Docs]

## The Problem
Manual API testing is slow...

## The Solution
[GIF of 60s capture → 47 tests]

## Quick Start
...

## Features
- Snapshot Regression
- AI Test Suggestions
- Contract Guardian
...
```

**Files to modify:**
- `README.md` (complete rewrite)

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Compelling opening
- Clear value prop in first 10 seconds
- Non-technical readers understand value

Build 3 complete example projects demonstrating TraceTap use cases.

**Requirements:**
- Create `examples/` directory
- Three different use cases
- Working code with README
- Real API examples

**Examples:**
1. **E-commerce API Testing**
   - Capture checkout flow
   - Generate regression suite
   - Contract testing setup

2. **REST API Regression Suite**
   - Full CRUD operations
   - Automated test generation
   - CI/CD integration

3. **Contract Testing in CI/CD**
   - GitHub Actions workflow
   - Contract verification
   - PR blocking on failures

**Files to create:**
- `examples/ecommerce-api/` (full example)
- `examples/regression-suite/` (full example)
- `examples/contract-testing/` (full example)

**Acceptance criteria:**
- All examples work out of the box
- Clear README in each
- Real-world scenarios

Create visual assets for README and documentation.

**Requirements:**
- 5-10 demo GIFs showing key workflows
- Screenshots of key features
- Organized in assets/ directory
- Optimized file sizes

**GIFs needed:**
1. Quick start flow (install → capture → tests)
2. Snapshot regression generation
3. AI test suggestions
4. Contract verification
5. HTML report viewer

**Tools:**
- Use `asciinema` for terminal recording
- Convert to GIF with `agg` or similar
- Screenshots for HTML reports

**Files to create:**
- `assets/demo-gifs/*.gif`
- `assets/screenshots/*.png`

**Acceptance criteria:**
- GIFs are smooth and clear
- File sizes < 5MB each
- Embedded in README looks professional

Make all error messages user-friendly and actionable.

**Requirements:**
- Audit all error messages
- Replace technical errors with helpful ones
- Add suggestions for fixes
- Test common error scenarios

**Examples:**
- Bad: `AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get'`
- Good: `No traffic captured. Did you configure your app to use proxy port 8080?`

**Files to modify:**
- All CLI entry points
- Core modules with user-facing errors

**Error scenarios to improve:**
1. No traffic captured
2. Invalid JSON file
3. Missing API key
4. Network errors
5. Invalid command arguments

**Acceptance criteria:**
- All errors have helpful messages
- Suggestions provided where possible
- User tested with non-technical QA engineers

Implement beautiful progress indicators using `rich` library.

**Requirements:**
- Progress bars for long operations
- Spinners for indeterminate tasks
- Color-coded output (green/yellow/red)
- Clear status messages

**Operations needing progress:**
- Traffic capture (countdown timer)
- Test generation (progress bar)
- AI analysis (spinner)
- Contract verification (progress bar)

**Files to modify:**
- All CLI entry points
- Long-running operations

**Visual design:**
- Use `rich.progress` for bars
- Use `rich.console` for colors
- Use `rich.table` for summaries

**Acceptance criteria:**
- All long operations show progress
- Output is beautiful and clear
- Terminal-size responsive

Optimize GitHub repo for open source community engagement.

**Requirements:**
- Add relevant topics/tags
- Create issue templates
- Create CONTRIBUTING.md

**Topics to add:**
- qa, testing, api-testing, test-automation
- mitmproxy, playwright, ai-powered

**Files to create:**

- `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md`

issues.summary: Create launch content for social media
issues.description:
Write and prepare launch content for Reddit, HN, Dev.to, Twitter.

**Requirements:**
- Hacker News post
- Reddit posts (multiple subreddits)
- Dev.to article (detailed)
- Twitter thread
- LinkedIn post

**Platforms:**
1. **Hacker News**
   - Title: "Show HN: TraceTap - Generate API tests from traffic with AI"
   - Include demo GIF

2. **Reddit**
   - r/QualityAssurance
   - r/SoftwareTesting
   - r/devops
   - Title: "I built a tool that generates tests from API traffic"

3. **Dev.to Article**
   - "How to Automate Regression Testing with AI"
   - 1500+ words, detailed tutorial

4. **Twitter Thread**
   - 5-7 tweets with demo GIF

**Files to create:**
- `launch/hn-post.md`
- `launch/reddit-posts.md`
- `launch/devto-article.md`
- `launch/twitter-thread.md`

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Compelling hooks
- Includes demo visuals
- Clear call to action

Coordinate simultaneous launch across all platforms for maximum visibility.

**Requirements:**
- Schedule launch day/time (Tuesday-Thursday 8-10am EST)
- Post to all platforms
- Monitor and respond to comments
- Track metrics

**Launch sequence:**
1. Publish demo video (YouTube)
2. Post to Hacker News
3. Post to Reddit (stagger by 2 hours)
4. Publish Dev.to article
5. Tweet thread
6. LinkedIn post
7. Email to QA newsletters

**Monitoring:**
- GitHub stars/forks
- Reddit upvotes/comments
- HN points/comments
- Twitter engagement
- Website traffic (if applicable)

**Response plan:**
- Reply to all questions within 2 hours
- Collect feedback/feature requests
- Fix critical issues immediately

**Acceptance criteria:**
- All platforms posted
- Active engagement
- Feedback collected

Build ready-to-use CI/CD templates for popular platforms.

**Requirements:**
- GitHub Actions template
- GitLab CI template
- Jenkins pipeline template
- Documentation for each

**Files to create:**
- `.github/workflows/examples/contract-test.yml`
- `.github/workflows/examples/regression-test.yml`
- `integrations/gitlab-ci/.gitlab-ci.yml`
- `integrations/jenkins/Jenkinsfile`
- `integrations/README.md`

**Templates should:**
- Work copy-paste
- Include comments explaining each step
- Handle secrets properly
- Fail builds appropriately

**Acceptance criteria:**
- All templates tested and working
- Clear documentation
- Easy to customize

Comprehensive testing across all platforms and features before launch.

**Requirements:**
- Test on Linux, macOS, Windows
- Test all installation methods
- Test all three killer features end-to-end
- Performance testing
- User acceptance testing

**Test matrix:**
- OS: Linux, macOS, Windows
- Install: pip, Docker, npm, Homebrew, one-liner
- Python: 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12
- Features: Regression, AI Suggestions, Contract Guardian

**Performance targets:**
- 100 requests analyzed in < 5s
- 1000 requests captured without issues
- Test generation < 10s for 50 requests

**User testing:**
- 5 QA engineers test quick start
- Collect feedback
- Fix critical issues

**Acceptance criteria:**
- All features work on all platforms
- Performance meets targets
- User feedback positive

issues.summary: Set up metrics and analytics tracking
issues.description:
Implement tracking to measure adoption and usage.

**Requirements:**
- GitHub star tracking
- Download metrics (pip, Docker, npm)
- Usage analytics (optional, privacy-friendly)
- Feature usage tracking

**Metrics to track:**
- GitHub stars, forks, issues
- Package downloads
- Feature usage (if user opts in)
- Error rates
- Performance metrics

**Privacy:**
- Make all tracking opt-in
- No PII collected
- Clear privacy policy

**Dashboard:**
- Simple dashboard for key metrics
- Weekly reports

**Acceptance criteria:**
- Metrics collection working
- Privacy-friendly
- Insights actionable
